title: Definitions
doc_html:
§1103.2. Definitions

            As used in this Part:

            (1) "Board" means the Louisiana State Board of Medical Examiners.

            (2) "Department" means the Louisiana Department of Health.

            Acts 1999, No. 199, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1300.152 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
doc_text:
§1103.2.  Definitions
As used in this Part:
(1)  "Board" means the Louisiana State Board of Medical Examiners.
(2)  "Department" means the Louisiana Department of Health.
Acts 1999, No. 199, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1300.152 by HCR 84 of 2015
R.S.
